title: Agent Quota core safety contract v1

x-aq-array-order.coverage_rule: enumerate every schema object with type=array; one exact override wins, otherwise the default is the sole policy; duplicate or dangling override rejects

enum: validation-input-changed|validator pause before final verify|"stable README bytes"->"concurrent README replacement"
retention-synonym-corpus|all retention fixture sources|"fixture-id-independent expected verdicts"->"unchanged replay"
release-gate-root-substitution|gate fixed-root executable identity|"gate from selected root"->"gate executable from different root"
release-gate-concurrent-replacement|gate pause before final verify|"stable README bytes"->"concurrent README replacement"
npm-implementation-tree-drift|resolved npm implementation tree|"pinned-tree-digest"->"copy with lib/cli.js mutation"
